language.title: Choose your language
language.subtitle: You fit change am anytime for settings.

hours.title: How much time you fit give?
hours.subtitle: Every week — talk true, you fit change am later.

schedule.title: Which time you dey learn well?
schedule.subtitle: We go set your reminders to match.

anchor.title: Join am with one daily habit (optional)
anchor.subtitle: “After dinner” dey work pass “6pm” — pick di habit wey you go study after.

done.title: Everything don set!
done.subtitle: Welcome to DextaLearning — make we start learning.
done.with_picks: Welcome to DextaLearning — see some courses wey you fit start with.

save_error: We no fit save your choices — you fit update am later.

aside.learner_subtitle: Small questions so we fit arrange courses, pace and reminders for you.
aside.instructor_subtitle: Set up your instructor profile so learners go sabi who dey teach dem.
aside.applicant_subtitle: We dey check every instructor application by hand. Na wetin make DextaLearning worth trust.

applicant.welcome_subtitle: Person dey check am, no be just form. Na dis go happen next.

points.review: Admin go read your profile and decide — usually within some days.
points.notified: We go email you sharp sharp wen answer land. You no need dey chase am.
points.meanwhile: Your account dey live now, so you fit take courses while you dey wait.

applicant.profile_title: Wetin we suppose sabi about you?
applicant.profile_subtitle: Na exactly dis di admin go see wen dem dey review your application, so make e count.
applicant.headline: Your headline
applicant.bio: Wetin you wan teach, and wetin qualify you?
applicant.bio_ph: Talk about your experience, and wetin you wan build here.
applicant.waiting_title: Thank you — we go reach you
applicant.waiting_subtitle: Your application dey with our admins. You go get email once dem decide.
applicant.meanwhile_note: For now your account dey work like any learner own: browse di catalogue, enrol, and start course today.
applicant.status_pending_title: Dem dey review your instructor application
applicant.status_pending_body: Admin dey check am. We go email you once dem decide — for now, everything here na for you to learn.
applicant.status_approved_title: You don get approval to teach 🎉
applicant.status_approved_body: Your Creator Studio don open. Start to build your first course.
applicant.status_rejected_body: We no fit approve am dis time. You still welcome well well as learner — message us if you want more detail.

whatsapp.title: Study reminders for WhatsApp
whatsapp.subtitle: Optional — add your number make we dey remind you small small.
whatsapp.optin: Send me study reminders for WhatsApp
whatsapp.optin_hint: You fit off am anytime for settings.

instructor.welcome_subtitle: Na wetin you fit do for the Creator Studio:

points.create: Create courses, learning paths and live cohorts with video, audio, PDF and text lessons.
points.earn: Earn from your content with the Earn-Back model — learners dey get reward for finishing, you dey collect for teaching.
points.publish: Publish anytime you ready — no approval needed to start.

instructor.profile_subtitle: Na your public face for every course wey you teach. You fit adjust am later.
instructor.headline: Headline
instructor.bio_ph: Tell learners about your experience and wetin you dey teach…
instructor.ready_subtitle: Enter go create your first course — e no go take you many minutes.
instructor.payout_note: 💡 Set up your payout account later for Settings — you fit publish and dey gather earnings before then.
